Notice Of Motion And Motion For Change Of Venue
Off Calendar Jan-16-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS NICHOLAS DIAZ, JR. AND A-1 EASTERN HOMEMADE PICKLE COMPANY, INC.'S Motion For Change Of Venue (to the Superior Court of California, in and for the County of Los Angeles) is GRANTED. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: A. James Robertson, II; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/AJR)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Change Of Venue
Off Calendar Dec-17-2014 Continued To Jan-16-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS NICHOLAS DIAZ AND A-1 EASTERN HOMEMADE PICKLE COMPANY, INC.'S Motion For Change Of Venue is continued to January 16, 2015 to give moving and opposition parties the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers and opposing party must deliver courtesy copies of the statement of non-opposition to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than December 17, 2014 at 4:00 p.m. or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). (302/EHG)
